# SpotTransfer

Transfer your Spotify playlists to YouTube Music.

## What it does

SpotTransfer is a free, open-source web app that lets you move your Spotify playlists over to YouTube Music. Sign in with both accounts, pick your playlists, and it handles the matching and creation.

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React + TypeScript (Vite), deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Node.js/Express

## Notes

Spotify API access for this kind of transfer requires Premium developer credentials. The app handles auth via OAuth for both Spotify and YouTube Music.

## Links

- Live app: https://spot-transfer.vercel.app/
- GitHub repo: https://github.com/Pushan2005/SpotTransfer
- License: MIT
